item.title: ZmICE1
item.description: Gene Details: Gene ID: GRMZM25173534 Gene Symbol: ZmICE1 Gene Name: Genome: B73_RefGen_v3 Species: Zea mays Functional Descriptions: As AtYODA acts as a molecular switch in stomatal differentiation and O11 interacts with ZmICE1 and directly regulates ZmYoda, we speculated that ZmICE1 might also be involved in regulating ZmYoda.
